entry_tagline: Software Engineer in Hong Kong. This is my homelab entry point, which may eventually include some strange things and simple tools.
entry_link_github_desc: Source code, infrastructure configuration, and various projects.
profile_currently_body: Running a Proxmox VE homelab, researching AI / LLM / agents, experimenting with locally deployed LLMs, and building internal tools.
profile_about_p1: A Software Engineer in Hong Kong, primarily working on programming, infrastructure, automation, self-hosted services, and AI-assisted tools.
profile_about_p2: I run my own homelab on Proxmox VE, using OPNsense to segment and secure a multi-VLAN network, a reverse proxy as the main entry point, and Docker to run services. Parts of it are managed with infrastructure as code and automated deployments.
profile_about_p3: Recently, I have been working with AI more often, using LLMs to build tools and letting agents manage the homelab under my supervision, making life a little easier and simpler.
